parsed.availability_comment: Finger injury reported in November 2025, but Seifert returned and played New Zealand's 2026 T20 World Cup immediately before IPL.
parsed.availability_note: Available for the published first-phase IPL fixtures; no current injury or national-duty clash indicated.
parsed.followup_reason: No confirmed KKR XII/role declaration yet; overseas combination remains unresolved.
parsed.overseas_competition_comment: Allen is the like-for-like rival; Narine, Green, Pathirana and Mustafizur also crowd the four overseas spots.
parsed.overseas_competition_note: Competes for an overseas slot as a wicketkeeper-opener, with another NZ WK-opener already in squad and multiple higher-priority overseas picks.
parsed.playing_xi_comment: Reserve WK-opener profile; direct overlap with Finn Allen and pressure from stronger overseas first-choice options.
